headline: Goldman Sachs Loves 3 Strong Buy Natural Gas Energy Stocks
summary: Founded in 1869, Goldman Sachs is the world’s second-largest investment bank by revenue and is ranked 55th on the Fortune 500 list of the largest United States corporations by total revenue.
